title: Agentboard Skill Frontmatter
description: JSON Schema for the YAML frontmatter block in a SKILL.md file.

name.description: Canonical skill identifier, e.g. ab-research. Must be kebab-case.

description.description: One-sentence summary of what the skill does, shown in discoverability indexes.

version.description: Semantic version of the skill definition, e.g. 1.0.0.

origin.description: Whether this skill ships with agentboard or comes from the community.

author.description: Optional. Human-readable author name or GitHub handle.

tags.description: Optional. Free-form labels for filtering and discoverability.

harnesses.description: Optional. Agent harnesses this skill is compatible with, e.g. claude-code, codex, gemini.

min_agentboard_version.description: Optional. Minimum agentboard CLI version required to run this skill.

argument-hint.description: Optional. Short description of the CLI argument the skill accepts.

allowed-tools.description: Optional. Explicit list of tool names the skill is permitted to invoke.
